script: RT=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv); TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' -d "refresh_token=$RT" -d 'scope=AppCatalog.ReadWrite.All offline_access' | python3 -c 'import json,sys;print(json.load(sys.stdin)["access_token"])'); echo tok_len=${#TOKEN}; for CAT in d927ccfc-fd7f-4dff-8395-176742887c51 e1a45203-05f2-48da-814c-15e6211a7ea2 41f24222-17fb-4db0-9fbf-a10f7c2060b0 5ddfd3e1-de0b-4c09-88cb-fccb2d47d329; do CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' -X DELETE "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/${CAT}" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"); echo "$CAT -> $CODE"; done
